name: The Scary Door
author: Mc.Gnolan
bootlegger: The Fortune Teller is told the number of players that registered to them as a demon each night.
The Puzzlemaster must choose to use their guess at night as a 'Once per game' ability.
The Demon is not told that the Lunatic is in play
The Demon is not told that the Boffin is granting them a not-in-play good character's ability or which.
The Assassin can use their ability on the first night.
Any character that choses a player on their first must be "Mad" about having the Butler's ability
